mapper.select:
WITH RECURSIVE reply_tree (id, topic_id, type) AS ( -- 第一层：话题下的直接回复（type = 1） SELECT r1.id, r1.topic_id, r1.type FROM discussion_topic_reply r1 WHERE r1.type = 1 AND r1.topic_id = #{topicId} AND r1.is_shield = 0
UNION ALL
-- 递归向下：所有子层（type = 2，topic_id 指向父回复 id） SELECT r2.id, r2.topic_id, r2.type FROM discussion_topic_reply r2 JOIN reply_tree p ON r2.topic_id = p.id WHERE r2.type = 2 AND r2.is_shield = 0 ) SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM reply_tree
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM discussion_topic_reply r WHERE r.topic_id = #{topicId} AND r.type = 1 AND r.is_shield = 0

WITH RECURSIVE roots AS ( SELECT r.id AS id, r.topic_id AS topicId, r.creator AS creator, r.add_datetime AS addDatetime, r.reply_content AS replyContent, COALESCE(ul.cnt, 0) AS likeNumber FROM discussion_topic_reply r LEFT JOIN ( SELECT correlation_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM user_likes WHERE type = 2 GROUP BY correlation_id ) ul ON ul.correlation_id = r.id WHERE r.topic_id = #{topicId} AND r.type = 1
AND r.is_shield = 0
ORDER BY
likeNumber DESC, r.add_datetime DESC
r.add_datetime DESC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset} ), tree AS ( SELECT id AS node_id, id AS root_id FROM roots UNION ALL SELECT c.id AS node_id, t.root_id FROM discussion_topic_reply c JOIN tree t ON c.topic_id = t.node_id WHERE c.type = 2
AND c.is_shield = 0
), desc_count AS ( SELECT root_id, COUNT(*) - 1 AS replyNumber FROM tree GROUP BY root_id ) SELECT r.id, r.topicId, r.creator, r.addDatetime, r.replyContent, r.likeNumber, COALESCE(dc.replyNumber, 0) AS replyNumber, COALESCE(u.nickname, '【匿名】') AS creatorName, CASE WHEN s.user_id IS NOT NULL THEN '学生' WHEN t.user_id IS NOT NULL THEN '教师' ELSE '匿名' END AS creatorRole, u.user_picture AS userPicture, CASE WHEN #{loginUserId} IS NOT NULL AND r.creator = #{loginUserId} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS isMine FROM roots r LEFT JOIN desc_count dc ON dc.root_id = r.id LEFT JOIN sys_tbuser u ON u.id = r.creator LEFT JOIN student s ON s.user_id = r.creator LEFT JOIN teacher t ON t.user_id = r.creator ORDER BY
r.likeNumber DESC, r.addDatetime DESC
r.addDatetime DESC
